name: LangChain
description: Framework for building applications powered by large language models with chains, agents, and memory.

name: OpenAI API
description: Powerful language models including GPT-4, GPT-3.5, and embedding models for various AI applications.

name: Pinecone
description: Vector database for semantic search, recommendation, and AI applications with high performance.

name: ChromaDB
description: Open-source embedding database designed for AI applications with simple API and local deployment.

name: Hugging Face
description: Platform for sharing and discovering models, datasets, and ML tools with collaborative features.

name: Anthropic Claude
description: Constitutional AI assistant with strong safety features and advanced reasoning capabilities.

name: FAISS
description: Facebook AI Similarity Search - library for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors.

name: CrewAI
description: Framework for building multi-agent AI systems with role-based agents and collaborative workflows.

name: AutoGen
description: Microsoft's multi-agent conversation framework for building complex AI applications.

name: Weaviate
description: Vector database with GraphQL API, real-time updates, and semantic search capabilities.

name: Ollama
description: Run large language models locally with support for various models and easy setup.

name: LlamaIndex
description: Data framework for LLM applications with data connectors, indexing, and query engines.
